title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
